headline: DoD cyber strategy will set a ‘clear and specific vision’ for AI to enable the force: Official
summary: Katie Sutton, Assistant Secretary of Defense for Cyber Policy and Principal Cyber Advisor, is looking to coordinate AI adoption across several entities within the Pentagon.

headline: Pentagon’s JWCC follow-on would create cloud marketplace, expand AI and edge computing
summary: A draft solicitation outlines plans for a three-tier cloud ecosystem that would support artificial intelligence, tactical edge operations and secure data sharing across the Defense Department. The post Pentagon’s JWCC follow-on would create cloud marketplace, expand AI and edge computing appeared…

headline: AI Forge: Accelerating AI breakthroughs for national security
summary: New report and RFI aim to align government, academia, and industry around forward-looking AI research.

headline: DARPA-developed autonomous helicopter technology transitions to U.S. Army
summary: An experimental, fly-by-wire H-60Mx Black Hawk, equipped with DARPA-funded autonomy, has been delivered to the U.S. Army for testing.
